nasb.text: Then David defeated Hadadezer, the son of Rehob king of Zobah, as he went to restore his rule at the River.

esv.text: David also defeated Hadadezer the son of Rehob, king of Zobah, as he went to restore his power at the river Euphrates.

cnv.text: 瑣巴王利合的兒子哈大底謝，往幼發拉底河去要奪回他統治這河的勢力的時候，大衛就攻打他。

ccb.text: 利合的儿子琐巴王哈大底谢出来要恢复他在幼发拉底河一带的势力，大卫打败了他，
